arts.ttl: Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price
arts.sum: Roma are determined to secure Alexis Saelemaekers on a permanent basis following his impressive performances since joining the club. The Giallorossi are planning direct contact with the Belgian player's agent in the coming days to discuss the potential transfer. The post Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready to sell Joao Felix to AC Milan
arts.sum: New Milan manager Sergio Conceicao knows Felix well from Portuguese and also believes that he is well suited to playing in a front two. Chelsea have decided to sell Joao Felix in January if they receive the right offer, according to Ben Jacobs.

arts.ttl: Champions League | AC Milan v Girona: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: AC Milan find themselves in a defensive predicament as they prepare for their upcoming Champions League match against Girona. The Rossoneri will be without both of their first-choice centre-backs, leaving manager Sergio Conceicao with a selection headache. arts.ttl: Milan Secures Gimenez’s Approval, Initiate Talks with Feyenoord; Walker’s Debut Set for Derby
arts.sum: AC Milan have received a positive signal from Santiago Gimenez, and negotiations with Feyenoord are set to begin. The Mexican striker with an Italian passport has expressed his desire to don the red and black jersey, and his entourage is working to make this dream a reality. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Kyle Walker learn transfer fate as AC Milan make final choice
arts.sum: AC Milan had been the leading contenders to sign both Marcus Rashford and Kyle Walker, but Serie A rules state that their clubs can only sign one British star per year
